reviews.comment:
No le doy 5 estrellas porque como pague con la app de YPF no me quiso hacer factura A y se puede

(Translated by Google)
I'm not giving it 5 stars because, since I paid with the YPF app, they wouldn't issue me an invoice (type A), which is possible.

reviews.comment:
Única YPF que nonte da factura A si pagas con la app de YPF son de terror no saben porque pero no te hacen factura A

reviews.comment:
Fui a lavar un vehículo usado que recien había comprado, me pongo en la cola, y al entrar a la zona de lavado, veo que lavan con una máquina de rodillos, como las de antes, no interviene ningún operador, después se pasa, a la zona de secado y aspirado, pero como es un servicio tercerizado, todo eso cuesta $1600, a un no socio $2100, y en la casa central cuesta $1200, pero lo lava un operador, no una máquina

(Translated by Google)
I went to wash a used vehicle I had just bought. I got in line, and when I entered the washing area, I saw that they wash it with a roller machine, like the old ones. No operator intervenes. Then it goes to the drying and vacuuming area, but since it's a third-party service, all of that costs $1600, $2100 for a non-member, and at the main branch it costs $1200, but there an operator washes it, not a machine.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPbWVxLVZ3EAE

reviews.comment:
